dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.qs1: Go to Pre-processing to generate geometry masks or convert physical units to LBM units.
dashboard.qs2: Go to Solve, pick a simulation type, configure parameters, and click Submit Job.
dashboard.qs4: Once complete, go to Post-process to view snapshots, plots, and metadata.
dashboard.qs5: Use Benchmarks to run validation suites against published reference data.

cad.title: Ship Hull CAD Modelling
cad.preview_hint: Select hull type and parameters, then click Preview.
cad.voxel_desc: Generate the 3-D LBM obstacle mask for the CAD hull.
cad.launch_desc: Directly submit a 3-D ship-hull LBM simulation from the current CAD hull. The hull mask is passed to the solver; results appear in Post-process.
cad.wigley_desc: Classic ITTC parabolic hull. Analytical Cb = 4/9 ≈ 0.444. Used as a standard validation benchmark in naval hydrodynamics.
cad.series60_desc: DTMB Series 60 (Cb=0.60) polynomial approximation. Representative of a standard merchant vessel. Widely used for resistance and wave-making studies.
cad.kcs_desc: KRISO Container Ship approximation (Cb≈0.651). Modern container ship hull form with blunt bow and full midship section.

preprocess.title: Pre-processing
preprocess.vertices_hint: Enter integer pixel coordinates, one pair per line.

cylinder_flow.label: Cylinder Flow (2D)
cylinder_flow.desc: Flow past a 2D cylinder. Validates Strouhal number and drag coefficient against Williamson (1988).

lid_driven_cavity.label: Lid-Driven Cavity (2D)
lid_driven_cavity.desc: Square cavity driven by a sliding top wall. Compare against Ghia et al. (1982).

backward_facing_step.label: Backward-Facing Step (2D)
backward_facing_step.desc: Channel with sudden expansion. Measures reattachment length x_r/h.

turbulent_channel.label: Turbulent Channel (2D LES)
turbulent_channel.desc: Body-force-driven channel with Smagorinsky LES. Validates log-law velocity profile.

pipeline_flow.label: Pipeline Flow (2D)
pipeline_flow.desc: Near-bed cylinder flow (e/D gap ratio). Measures Strouhal number.

dam_break.label: Dam Break (2D multiphase)
dam_break.desc: Collapsing fluid column benchmark. Validates front position against Martin & Moyce (1952).

sloshing_tank.label: Sloshing Tank (2D multiphase)
sloshing_tank.desc: Harmonically forced tank. Compares sloshing frequency with Faltinsen (1978) model.

porous_drainage.label: Porous Drainage (2D)
porous_drainage.desc: Two-phase drainage through a random porous medium.

sphere_flow.label: Sphere Flow (3D D3Q19)
sphere_flow.desc: 3D flow past a sphere. Measures drag coefficient.

ship_hull.label: Ship Hull – Wigley (3D)
ship_hull.desc: 3D Wigley hull resistance. Reports Cd and hull symmetry.

postprocess.title: Post-processing
postprocess.summary_hint: Select a job to view results.
postprocess.no_job_logs: Select a job to view logs.
postprocess.no_job_meta: Select a job to view metadata.
postprocess.name: Name

bench.title: Benchmarks
bench.marine_desc: Cylinder flow (St/Cd), sloshing tank (Faltinsen), near-bed pipeline (St), turbulent channel (log-law), Wigley hull (Cd).
bench.multiphase_desc: Static droplet (Laplace), spinodal decomposition, two-phase Poiseuille comparison (SCMC + CG).
bench.ghia_desc: Compare centreline velocity profiles against Ghia et al. (1982) reference data at Re = 100 / 400 / 1000.
bench.mlups_desc: D2Q9 BGK throughput in Million Lattice Updates Per Second (MLUPS) at multiple grid sizes.
bench.porous_desc: Laplace pressure test and capillary invasion benchmarks for porous media multiphase flow.

compare.title: Compare runs
compare.desc: Select 2–10 completed jobs and view their derived parameters and diagnostics side by side.
compare.min_jobs: Select at least 2 jobs to compare.

agent.title: AI Agent
agent.subtitle: – Conversational modelling → compute → analysis
agent.input_placeholder: e.g. Run a cylinder flow at Re=200, n_steps=2000 / 运行一个 Re=200 的圆柱绕流
agent.welcome:
👋 Hello! I am the TensorLBM intelligent assistant. I can help you complete the full workflow of “modelling → solving → analysis & visualisation”:
- Tell me your scenario, e.g. “Run a cylinder flow at Re=200, nx=200, n_steps=2000”
- You can also query job status, analyse results, or extract velocity profiles.
- 中文命令同样支持！
agent.offline_hint: Set TENSORLBM_LLM_API_KEY to enable a remote LLM.
